turns.speaker: You
turns.text: hey! i saw your issue regarding billing

turns.speaker: You
turns.text: i really appreciate your patience. things were a little hectic recently so as haven't been on top of messages as i want

turns.speaker: You
turns.text: i looked at your case, and the situation was that we didn't align usage reset date with the subscription billing date, which can get confusing

turns.speaker: You
turns.text: we shipped out a change to this yesterday so that your quota always renews with each invoice payment

turns.speaker: You
turns.text: thanks for your patience with this, i know it can get a little confusing. i've reset your usage limits as a courtesy. let me know if the usage limits look good on your end! 🙂

turns.speaker: Bankim
turns.text: @Henry looks like again I am seeing the same issue. After payment token is not getting reset. Can you please see the issue and update me ASAP. Thank you.

turns.speaker: Bankim
turns.text: Can you please confirm, untill you fix the issue can I move my pro plan to free plan and continue my work. Once the issue is fix you can help me to move it back my previous pro plan.
